message:
🌱 Add rook: Mon canary pod remains pending even when not needed anymore mission (#1797)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "rook-3764-mon-canary-pod-remains-pending-even-when-not-needed-anymore",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "rook: Mon canary pod remains pending even when not needed anymore",
+    "description": "Mon canary pod remains pending even when not needed anymore. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify rook troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your rook deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook -n rook --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review rook configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant rook configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook\n```\n**Is this a bug report or feature request?**\n* Bug Report\n\n**Deviation from expected behavior:**\nThe mon canary pod may remain in a pending state even if not needed."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Mon canary pod remains pending even when not needed anymore",
+        "description": "~With this modification the mon failover process is not executed if there is\nno available nodes where to schedule the mon pod.\nThis avoid to have mon canary pods in Pending state because no nodes\navailable.~\n\nIf for any cause the operator processing a mon failover is restarted, the\nmon canary pods\n```yaml\nrook-ceph-mon-d-canary remained in pending state even after other 3  rook-ceph-mon pods came up and running.\n\n\n$ oc -n openshift-storage get pods | grep rook-ceph-mon\nrook-ceph-mon-a-84ddfd7588-vvxr4                1/1     Running     1          5h53m\nrook-ceph-mon-b-57b794b755-wx6x8                1/1     Running     0          4h38m\nrook-ceph-mon-c-5bb7549576-cx4xr                1/1     Running     1          5h52m\nrook-ceph-mon-d-canary-59d9d74795-k9s56         0/1     Pending     0          146m\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade rook to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade rook:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade rook rook/rook --namespace rook\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook\nhelm list -n rook\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Mon canary pod remains pending even when not… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook -n rook --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "~With this modification the mon failover process is not executed if there is\nno available nodes where to schedule the mon pod.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "rook-ceph-mon-d-canary remained in pending state even after other 3  rook-ceph-mon pods came up and running.\n\n\n$ oc -n openshift-storage get pods | grep rook-ceph-mon\nrook-ceph-mon-a-84ddfd7588-vvxr4                1/1     Running     1          5h53m\nrook-ceph-mon-b-57b794b755-wx6x8                1/1     Running     0          4h38m\nrook-ceph-mon-c-5bb7549576-cx4xr                1/1     Running     1          5h52m\nrook-ceph-mon-d-canary-59d9d74795-k9s56         0/1     Pending     0          146m",
+        "# kubectl version\nClient Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"16\", GitVersion:\"v1.16.2\", GitCommit:\"c97fe5036ef3df2967d086711e6c0c405941e14b\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-10-15T19:18:23Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.12.10\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\nServer Version: version.Info{Major:\"1\", Minor:\"17\", GitVersion:\"v1.17.0\", GitCommit:\"70132b0f130acc0bed193d9ba59dd186f0e634cf\", GitTreeState:\"clean\", BuildDate:\"2019-12-07T21:12:17Z\", GoVersion:\"go1.13.4\", Compiler:\"gc\", Platform:\"linux/amd64\"}\n\n[root@rook-ceph-operator-77b4b868d8-7jgx6 /]# rook version\nrook: v1.1.0-beta.0.661.gdca96729-dirty\ngo: go1.12.7",
+        "# kubectl -n rook-ceph describe pod rook-ceph-operator-844c546bb5-rdwps  | grep Node:\nNode:         ku-worker-00.karmalabs.com/192.168.122.132"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "rook",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "rook"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/rook/rook/issues/3764",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/rook/rook",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/rook/rook/pull/4549"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-27T06:34:45.871Z",
